Pujya Gurudevshri  ·  Dharmayatra 2026

Ocean of Compassion

A sacred gathering in the pious presence of Bapaji.

June 22–23, 2026 Oceanside, CA
Register Now

An Opportunity For Inner Transformation

Join Pujya Gurudevshri for an intimate two day retreat at the Seabird Ocean Resort in Oceanside, California, steps away from the Pacific Ocean.

This retreat is a rare opportunity to spend meaningful, informal, and immersive time in Bapaji's pious presence.

Who May Attend

  • Raj Parivar Mumukshus of Los Angeles
  • Raj Parivar Mumukshus of San Diego
  • Raj Parivar Mumukshus of San Francisco
  • Raj Parivar Mumukshus of Sacramento
  • Raj Parivar Mumukshus of Seattle
  • Raj Parivar Mumukshus of Phoenix

Others may attend only with express permission, please reach out to Janav Shah at (714) 443-1652 if this is you.

Program

Retreat Schedule

Monday, June 22 — Tuesday, June 23

The retreat will begin after lunch on Monday, June 22nd, and conclude after lunch on Tuesday, June 23rd.

A detailed schedule will be communicated directly to registered attendees.

In His Presence

Immerse in the Joy of HIS Divine Presence

Experience the rare blessing of gathering with fellow Raj Parivar in the loving presence of Pujya Gurudevshri on the shores of the Pacific.

Venue

The Seabird Ocean Resort

A Destination by Hyatt Hotel

The Seabird Ocean Resort & Spa

101 Mission Ave, Oceanside, CA 92054
Oceanfront resort along the Oceanside coast with sweeping views of the Pacific Ocean
~1 hr from Los Angeles  ·  ~40 min from San Diego
Get Directions

Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Registration closes on Friday, May 15th at 11:59 PM PT. After you register, we'll follow up with details on booking your room at The Hyatt Seabird Ocean Resort.

The registration fee is $150 per person, covering all sessions and meals. The actual cost per attendee is anticipated to be significantly higher. This reduced fee is made possible through the generous contributions for Laabh. Children under the age of 5 may attend free of charge and should not be registered.

Room booking details will be shared after May 15th. You'll be contacted directly with everything you need. In the meantime, please join the WhatsApp group for this retreat using the button below.

All attendees are required to stay on-site at The Hyatt Seabird Ocean Resort on the night of Monday, June 22nd. Unfortunately, commuting is not an option for this retreat.
